_doc: wq-048 — editorial overrides for the consensus engine. When key '<slug>.<year>.collected_revenue' is present and not expired, override.value wins over engine output. Provenance records both the engine calc AND the override reason. Set expiry dates to force re-review.

openai.2025.collected_revenue.reason: Per assumptions-audit.md §1.1, conservative editorial position pending fuller H2 2025 data
